title: What temperature is too cold for chinchillas?

de: Welche Temperatur ist für Chinchillas zu kalt? Welche Temperatur ist für Chinchillas zu kalt? Die Gefahrenzone für Chinchillas besteht, wenn die Temperaturen unter 15,5 °C (60 °F) sinken. It’s anything below this, as it can quickly lead to hypothermia and related health issues…

title: Cold weather warnings issued for Ottawa, eastern Ontario
description: Environment Canada is warning of extremely frigid weather overnight in Ottawa and across a large swath of the wider region, with it feeling as cold as –35 in the wind.
content:
Environment Canada is warning of extremely frigid weather overnight in Ottawa and across a large swath of the wider region.
The yellow-level warning, the lowest on Environment Canada's new three-col… [+1364 chars]
de: Für Ottawa im Osten Ontarios wurden Warnungen vor kaltem Wetter ausgegeben. Environment Canada warnt vor extrem kaltem Wetter über Nacht in Ottawa und in weiten Teilen der weiteren Region, wobei der Wind bis zu -35°C kalt sein kann.
en: Cold weather warnings issued for Ottawa, eastern Ontario. Environment Canada is warning of extremely frigid weather overnight in Ottawa and across a large swath of the wider region, with it feeling as cold as –35 in the wind.
la: Monita frigoris edita in Ottawa, Ontario Orientali. Environment Canada admonet tempestates pernoctare in Ottawa perquam frigida et per magnum fasciculum latioris regionis, sentiens tam frigidum quam -35 in vento.
